function.name: submit_work
function.arguments: {"requirements": [{"title": "Greeting endpoint returns JSON response", "description": "The /hello endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a greeting string. The response must have Content-Type application/json and return HTTP 200."}, {"title": "Goodbye endpoint returns JSON response", "description": "The /goodbye endpoint must return a JSON object with a 'message' field containing a farewell string, following the same pattern as /hello."}, {"title": "UI displays messages from both endpoints", "description": "The JavaScript frontend must fetch from both /hello and /goodbye endpoints and display the returned messages in the HTML page."}]}
